THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENG, ENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMOPOULOS, PETER $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $694.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,944.00, DEFT PETER DEMOPOULOS SHALL RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF ENG HENG COST AND DISBURSEMENT PURS TO CCP 998 IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,423.23. PURS TO CCP 998(E), THE COURT FINDS THAT THE COSTS AWARDED TO PETER DEMOPOULOS EXCEED THE AMOUNT OF DAMAGES, AND THUS THE PLAINTIFF ENG HENG SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER NOTHING, AND DEFT PETER DEMOPOULOS SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF ENG HENG THE SUM OF $1479.23. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
